sentences.arabic: تَتَمَدَّدُ يَسْمِينُ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ لِمُدَّةِ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ دَقِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Jasmin se isteže svako jutro petnaest minuta.
sentences.translationEn: Yasmin stretches every morning for fifteen minutes.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ إِنَّ التَّمَدُّدَ يُخَفِّفُ أَلَمَ الظَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da istezanje smanjuje bol u leđima.
sentences.translationEn: She says that stretching reduces back pain.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتْ هَذِهِ التَّمَارِينَ مِنْ كِتَابٍ عَنِ الصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Naučila je ove vježbe iz knjige o zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: She learned these exercises from a health book.
She recommended the same exercises to her mother.
